title: Be Grateful
excerpt: Posted on Instagram this morning. I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger . If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple…
body:
Posted on Instagram this morning.

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
